REPLY IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PROMISSORY ESTOPPEL IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, MOOT AS THE ONLY REMEDY SOUGHT. FAC 21. , DEMURRER TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR FRAUDULENT CONCEALMENT (2ND ), CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD (3RD), NEGLIGENCE (5TH), NIED (6TH) AND UCL (4TH) VIOLATION IS OVERRULED TO THE EXTENT IT ALLEGES MISREPRESENTATION REGARDING POSTPONEMENT OF FORECLOSURE SALE DATE. (TO THE EXTENT THESE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE BASED ON FAILURE TO MODIFY/MISHANDLING OF MODIFICATION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ASPIRAS V. WELLS FARGO BANK (2013) 219 CAL.APP.4TH 948). DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FRO IIED. SEE PRICE V. WELLS FARGO (1989) 213 CAL.APP.3D 465 AND DAVENPORT V. LITTON LOAN SERVICING (N.D. CAL. 2010) 725 F.SUPP.2D 862. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR LOSS OF CREDIT EXPECTANCY (8TH), TO SET ASIDE TRUSTEE'S SALE (9TH) AND INJUNCTION (10TH). NO OPPOSITION FILED. PROPOSED ORDER TO BE SUBMITTED BY ANY PARTY APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE HARRY DORFMAN, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Jan-23-2014 Set For Trial On Aug-11-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Vesterdahl, Esq. of Reedsmith, (415659-5963), for Bank of America, Defendant and moving party.
Tiffany Norman, Esq. of TRN Law Associates, (415-823-4566), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL, for Peter Gardos, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Ms. Norman, Plaintiff's counsel, objects the motion to be heard and contested since Defendant's counsel did not notify the Plaintiff's counsel that Defendant's counsel will appear today to argue. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the first cause of action for promissory estoppel is sustained without leave to amend, moot as the only remedy sought. FAC 21. , demurrer to causes of action for fraudulent concealment (2nd ), constructive fraud (3rd), negligence (5th), NIED (6th) and UCL (4th) violation is overruled to the extent it alleges misrepresentation regarding postponement of foreclosure sale date. (To the extent these causes of action are based on failure to modify/mishandling of modification, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Aspiras v. Wells Fargo Bank (2013) 219 Cal.App.4th 948). Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the seventh cause of action fro IIED. See Price v. Wells Fargo (1989) 213 Cal.App.3d 465 and Davenport v. Litton Loan Servicing (N.D. Cal. 2010) 725 F.Supp.2d 862. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to causes of action for loss of credit expectancy (8th), to set aside trustee's sale (9th) and injunction (10th). No opposition filed. Proposed order to be submitted by any party approved as to form. Judge Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
